entities.description: teenage boy, slim build, wearing a blue hooded raincoat, dark pants, wet sneakers, cautious eyes
small gray cat, short fur, bright eyes, thin tail, expressive face, able to speak
rainy night city street, wet pavement, puddles, narrow sidewalks, dim shop fronts
old streetlamp with a round glowing bulb, casting light through heavy rain
damp cardboard box under shelter, torn edges, partly collapsed

panels.summary: Wide establishing shot of a rainy night city street, wet pavement reflecting lights, the boy in a blue hooded raincoat walking alone through heavy rain.
Medium shot from behind the boy as he pauses near an old streetlamp, rain dripping from his hood, shadows stretching across puddles.
Low angle close-up of a damp cardboard box beside the streetlamp, a small gray cat's bright eyes shining from the darkness inside.
The boy crouches beside the box, lifting the edge with one hand, surprised as the gray cat looks up calmly from inside.
Close-up of the gray cat sitting upright in the box, mouth open as it speaks, rain streaks behind it like dramatic manga speed lines.
Comedic shock panel: the boy recoils backward, hood slipping slightly, eyes wide, while the cat remains composed in the box.
The cat steps out of the box into a puddle under the streetlamp, looking up at the boy with a serious expression, rain sparkling around them.

text.speaker: cat
text.content: 跟我来，雨里有东西醒了。

panels.summary: Dynamic panel of the cat walking ahead along the wet street, tail raised, while the boy follows nervously, clutching his raincoat hood.
Final dramatic wide shot: boy and gray cat stand together beneath the streetlamp, facing a dark rain-filled alley beyond the street, ready to enter.

text.content: 他们的奇怪夜晚，才刚开始。
